summary: Iteration 67 - Sorties Detail Panel on Stock Dashboard. All features working correctly: (1) 'Sorties Aujourd'hui' KPI card is clickable with helper text, (2) Panel opens with 4 filters (Du, Au, Motif, Produit), Filtrer button, summary recap, and detailed table, (3) Default filters: today's date, Motif=Tous, (4) Motif options: Tous, Sortie/Vente, Perte, Casse, (5) Badge colors: red for sortie, amber for perte, rose for casse, 🛒 Vente for sales, (6) Product filter works client-side, (7) X button closes panel, (8) Toggle behavior works, (9) Helper text changes between 'Cliquer pour le détail' and 'Masquer le détail', (10) Regression: other KPI cards not clickable, 'Derniers Mouvements' section still works.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings in console about <tr> and <span> elements - does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: StockPage.jsx lines 121-160: State management for sorties detail panel (showSortiesDetail, sortiesDetail, sortiesFilters) with fetchSortiesDetail function that fetches movements by type and applies client-side product filter
StockPage.jsx lines 826-995: KPI cards with sorties-today-card having onClick handler and cursor-pointer class, Détail des sorties panel with filters, summary, and table
Product filter is client-side (filters on product_name after data is fetched) - requires clicking 'Filtrer' to apply
Badge logic correctly identifies 'Vente' in reason string and shows 🛒 Vente badge
seed_data_creation: None - used existing stock movements data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 67 added a clickable 'Sorties Aujourd'hui' KPI card on the Stock Dashboard that opens a detailed panel showing all stock exits (sortie, perte, casse). The panel has date filters (Du/Au), motif filter, product search, and displays a table with Date/Produit/Qté/Motif/PU/Total/Réf-Utilisateur columns. Sales from Caisse appear with reason containing 'Vente (Recette: ...)' and show 🛒 Vente badge. Test data exists from 2026-04-15 to 2026-04-25 with 37 movements.

🛒 Vente badge for reason containing 'Vente' - VERIFIED
